texto: In science there is a dictum: don't add an experiment to an experiment. Don't make things unnecessarily complicated. In writing fiction, the more fantastic the tale, the plainer the prose should be. Don't ask your readers to admire your words when you want them to believe your story.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ben Bova sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “In science there is a dictum: don't add an experiment to an experiment. Don't make things unneces…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, words-of-wisdom, experiment, útil em momentos de reflexao.

In writing fiction, the more fantastic the tale, the plainer the prose should be. Don't ask your readers to admire your words when you want them to believe your story.

texto: As long as we're tied to Middle Eastern oil we're tied to Middle Eastern politics. We're hostages to the terrorists and nutcases who want to wipe out Israel and the United States because we support Israel.
explicacao: Citação de Ben Bova sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “As long as we're tied to Middle Eastern oil we're tied to Middle Eastern politics. We're hostages…” articula reflexao, fossil-fuels, national-autonomy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como national-autonomy e politics.
